messages.content: the valuation format is weird $50B of 50
You're right! Let me check the valuation formats and clean them up:

Let me also just clean it up and show top valuations properly formatted.","state":"done"},{"type":"text","text":"Let me show you the data with **properly cleaned valuations**:","state":"done"},{"type":"tool-executeSql","toolCallId":"executeSql:7","state":"output-available","input":{"sql":"SELECT 
  Company,
  CASE 
    WHEN Valuation LIKE '%B' THEN CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(Valuation, '$', ''), 'B', '') AS DECIMAL) 
    WHEN Valuation LIKE '%M' THEN CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(Valuation, '$', ''), 'M', '') AS DECIMAL) / 1000
    ELSE CAST(REPLACE(Valuation, '$', '') AS DECIMAL)
  END as Valuation_Billions,
  Industry,
  Country
FROM unicorns 
ORDER BY Valuation_Billions DESC 
LIMIT 15","databasePath":"md:my_db","userQuery":"Show top companies with cleaned valuation in billions","generateChart":true},"output":{"text":"Executed SELECT query successfully (User: John Doe - 123) on md:my_db.
